title: Resolve Meshtastic directed text destinations to LICHEN peers
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-t2hn.7 no-hardware implementation accepts broadcast TEXT_MESSAGE_APP ingress but deliberately rejects non-broadcast Meshtastic node numbers because there is no active peer table or node_num-to-LICHEN IID resolver in the Zephyr adapter. What needs to be done: add or reuse LICHEN peer enumeration state, map Meshtastic node_num values to LICHEN IPv6/IID destinations, and route directed text ingress through the same local message contract. Acceptance criteria: native_sim test covers known-peer unicast success and unknown-peer unsupported status; broadcast behavior remains unchanged; no Meshtastic RF packet is emitted.
notes:
Implementation evidence 2026-07-01: directed Meshtastic TEXT_MESSAGE_APP now resolves known peer node_num values through the NodeDB/app_identity peer snapshot to EUI-64/IID metadata, preserves broadcast, rejects unknown/self/colliding node numbers as unsupported, and routes gateway ingress through lichen_app_interface_submit_text() with has_to_iid metadata. Tests added/updated in meshtastic_adapter, meshtastic_gateway_adapter, and app_interface. Review evidence: independent code reviews (Nash, Leibniz) found no resolver P0/P1/P2 defects; both identified production closure risk because no production submit_text consumer is registered yet, which is tracked by project-LICHEN-t2hn.7.2. Validation evidence: local git diff --check PASS; attempted broad local python pytest blocked by missing local deps filelock/serial/jsonschema; EC2 us-east-2a builder i-05e27e074db786e22 with EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58, clean worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-t2hn65-validate: west twister -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_adapter -T lichen/tests/app_interface -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -p native_sim ... PASS 3/3, 97 cases; west twister -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_adapter -p qemu_x86 ... PASS 1/1, 65 cases; west build -b native_sim lichen/apps/gateway ... PASS, size text=150479 data=6001 bss=47933 dec=204413.
Follow-up evidence 2026-07-01: production submit_text sink dependency identified by reviews is addressed by project-LICHEN-t2hn.7.2 implementation. Meshtastic directed text gateway test now uses the production gateway message_contract sink instead of a fake test sink.
close_reason: Completed no-hardware implementation: directed Meshtastic node_num destinations resolve through peer snapshots to LICHEN EUI/IID metadata; unknown/self/collision paths are unsupported; gateway path now uses production message_contract submit_text sink from project-LICHEN-t2hn.7.2; native_sim/qemu/build evidence recorded.
